copyright: © 2026 NexVigilant, LLC. Shannon information-theoretic molecular weight computation is a proprietary NexVigilant method.
title: Molecular Weight — Information-Theoretic Concept Mass
description: Compute the 'molecular weight' of any concept from its constituent T1 primitives using Shannon information theory. Periodic table of primitive atomic masses, concept comparison with Jaccard similarity, and transfer confidence prediction. Pure Rust via nexcore-lex-primitiva.

tools.name: compute
tools.description: Compute molecular weight of a concept from primitive composition. Returns daltons, transfer class, and constituent atomic masses.

parameters.name: primitives
parameters.description: Array of primitive names or symbols (e.g., ['state', 'boundary'] or ['ς', '∂'])

tools.name: periodic-table
tools.description: Get the full periodic table of T1 primitive atomic masses (16 entries) with Shannon entropy statistics.

tools.name: compare
tools.description: Compare molecular weights of two concepts. Shows weight delta, shared/unique primitives, Jaccard similarity, and transfer class comparison.

tools.name: predict-transfer
tools.description: Predict cross-domain transfer confidence from a primitive composition. Returns MW-only and hybrid tier-aware predictions.

parameters.name: primitives
parameters.description: Array of primitive names or symbols
